Head of corporate communication
Catherine Abernathy
 
Plataform level 
Marketing (product Marketing)

Intutional

1st: Global level

2nd: Operational side
Marketing and communication per business unit and then in each of them there are the regional teams (is matrix)

title: Check Estimations EPIC for bart
description:
Bart asked me to check my opinion about his estimations
--------
Bartosz Suchocki
Mate, if you find time, could you check my estimations for adding DS to advic's EPIC components? https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1r1u0Z64ym0iUUhm6MKlEGEnhDBftUGLkuP_Xv4fVDxk/edit?pli=1&gid=…  And I'd need your gmail address to share
Hey Bro, was cheking this and seems very good analysis. Congratulations. quite well done
 
As a gut feeling, seems quite good. Im not sure what you mean by "md" in the component injection but seems a fair value. The only thing you should be aware is that advic thing usually has a lot of bugs. And they take forever to fix. 
 
But then is not your problem, just that this might delay some of the process. 
 
But if I were you I would add a new row "communication" and add some 20% ovr it. Just to be in the safe side. The you could have 40 hours for example, you would have 1 week to finish (or 2 in your new 50% contract)
 
let me know if I can help you in anything else.

title: Check Image problem - Create ticket
description:
https://products.solenis.com/fi/product/taski-jonmaster-ultra-damp-mop-eco-10kpl-40-cm-9292077. I checked but I could not find the problem-. 

-------- 
Henk-Jan Van Pesch, 
 
the link for this product you sent seems not available anymore.
statics.teams.cdn.office.net/evergreen-assets/safelinks/2/atp-safelinks.html
 
I investigate similar products and I could not find any that have similar issue.
However, Alex saw similar issue last week. I made an investigation in the time and was a super strange bug. 
Somehow there SF was replacing the inner content of the image, for no apparent reason, there was nothing in the code in our side that could explain that. But then the problem stop happening. 
 
Seems for me a problem in the SF side. I want to write a ticket about it but I need to see the problem happening again so I can take the code print screens to better describe the issue. 
 
Please inform me as soon you see this issue happening again.

------
